headline: The Trade Desk, Circle, And Venture Global Are Among the Top 10 Large-Cap Gainers Last Week (March 2-March 6): Are the Others in Your Portfolio?
summary: These large-cap gainers climbed last week on upbeat earnings, stronger guidance, analyst support, deal and buyback news, and sector-specific momentum in energy, ad tech and software.

headline: The Trade Desk (TTD) Soars 22.9% on OpenAI Partnership
summary: The Trade Desk Inc. (NASDAQ:TTD) is one of the 10 Stocks Investors Are Watching Closely This Week. The Trade Desk jumped by 22.9 percent week-on-week as investors gobbled up shares following reports that it sealed a deal with OpenAI to sell advertisements on ChatGPT. According to reports, OpenAI is setting its sights on advertising as […]
